_meta.description: 6岁级词汇和句子，覆盖学校、自然、社交、时间等扩展场景

examples.en: The teacher writes on the blackboard.
Draw a line with a ruler.

sentences.en: Open your textbook to page five.
The teacher is writing on the blackboard.

words.synonymDiff: recess是美式学校用语，break更通用

examples.en: We're going on a field trip!

sentences.cn: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

sentences.en: I like spring because flowers bloom.
sentences.cn: 我喜欢春天因为花会开。

examples.en: The bird sits on a branch.

I want to be an astronaut.
I see stars with a telescope.

sentences.en: The earth goes around the sun.

Gravity keeps us on the ground.

sentences.en: The moon is in the sky.

examples.cn: 恐龙很久以前就存在了。

sentences.cn: 我们应该保护濒危动物。

groups.title: 星期 Days of the Week

examples.en: What are you doing this weekend?

sentences.en: I don't have school on weekends.

examples.en: We eat at half past six.

sentences.en: There are twelve months in a year.

examples.en: I want to be a pilot.

sentences.en: What do you want to be when you grow up?

examples.en: Send a letter at the post office.
The fire truck is at the fire station.
Watch a play at the theater.
Watch a game at the stadium.
The doctor is at the hospital.

sentences.en: I need to go to the post office.

examples.en: Stop at the red traffic light.
My dad is a good driver.
I'll invite you to my party.
A stranger knocked on the door.

sentences.en: I invited my classmates to my party.
sentences.cn: 我邀请了同学们来我的派对。

examples.cn: 我们在这件事上意见不同。

sentences.en: I think this is a good idea.

sentences.cn: 你能解释一下为什么吗？

sentences.en: I feel so proud of you!
I'm confused. Can you help me?

examples.en: I love you with all my heart.
Sit up straight for your spine.
Cover your mouth when you cough.
Take the prescription to the pharmacy.

sentences.en: Cover your mouth when you cough.

examples.en: Don't eat too much junk food.

sentences.en: Wash your hands for good hygiene.
Too much junk food is bad for you.
sentences.cn: 吃太多垃圾食品对你不好。

sentences.en: A hundred is a big number.
Can you count to a hundred?
Let's measure how tall you are.
sentences.cn: 我们来量一量你有多高。

sentences.en: Let me read you a story.

examples.en: At the end of the story.

sentences.en: Every story has a beginning, middle, and end.
sentences.cn: 每个故事都有开头、中间和结尾。

sentences.en: Can you describe what you see?

examples.en: Don't sit too close to the screen.

sentences.en: Don't look at the screen too long.

sentences.cn: 不要告诉别人你的密码。

sentences.en: Do you want to play basketball?

examples.en: North is up on the map.

The sun sets in the west.

sentences.en: The store is on the corner.

sentences.cn: 我家在公园和学校之间。

examples.en: The Eiffel Tower is in France.

sentences.en: Beijing is the capital of China.

I went to the park yesterday.

examples.en: I expect you to be on time.

sentences.en: It will probably be sunny tomorrow.

examples.cn: 虽然累了，我还是要学习。

examples.en: I'll go unless you stop me.
examples.cn: 除非你阻止我，否则我会去。

examples.en: I don't know whether to go.
Whether you like it or not.

sentences.en: Although it rained, we still went out.
sentences.cn: 虽然下雨了，我们还是出去了。

sentences.en: I was hungry, however I didn't eat.

sentences.en: Pollution is bad for the earth.
